title: Selfsame canonical form and observation
description: Language-neutral canonical form (a tagged JSON array) and the observation record produced by replaying one input. See SPEC/protocol.md §4-§5.

canonical.description: A canonical form: a JSON array whose first element is a string tag. Two values share a canonical form iff they are observationally indistinguishable.

observation.description: The result of replaying one input on one version of a unit.

val.description: Canonical form of the return value. Mutually exclusive with 'exc'.

exc.description: Exception/error type name, present iff the call raised. Mutually exclusive with 'val'.

self_after.description: Canonical form of the post-call receiver state (methods only).

io.description: Count of uncontrolled I/O operations observed (> 0 ⇒ unverifiable).

nondet.description: True iff two controlled runs of this input disagreed (⇒ unverifiable).
